⭐ Vendor of the Week

Evertune: The Trade Desk Vets Building the Bloomberg Terminal for AI Search

GEO — Generative Engine Optimization — is becoming the most important channel no PMM is thinking about yet.

By Chris O'Hara · March 2, 2026

Here's a scenario that should make every product marketer uncomfortable: A VP of Procurement opens ChatGPT and asks for the best vendors in your category. Five companies are named. Yours isn't one of them. And unlike a bad Google ranking, there's no page two.

BS

Brian Stempeck

CEO & Co-Founder, Evertune

Former Chief Strategy Officer at The Trade Desk (employee #8). Helped scale TTD from zero to a $50B S&P 500 company. Started as a political journalist on Capitol Hill before building one of adtech's great success stories.

The Problem They're Solving

When Brian Stempeck needed a pool heater in early 2024, he went to ChatGPT instead of Google. What he found — wild inconsistency across models, opaque recommendation logic, zero measurement tools — looked exactly like programmatic advertising before anyone built the infrastructure to make it work.

He reconnected with two former Trade Desk colleagues (Ed Chater and Poul Costinsky from AdBrain), and they all saw the same thing: AI is becoming a primary discovery channel, and nobody's building the analytics layer.

"If you're not optimizing for AI search, you're optimizing for yesterday's internet."

What Evertune Does

1M+ prompts/brand/month
100x sampling per prompt
8 AI models tracked

Platform Capabilities

  • AI Brand Monitoring — Share of voice for the LLM era. Track how often models recommend you vs. competitors.
  • Consumer Preferences — Which buyer attributes actually drive model recommendations in your category?
  • Content Strategy — Identify high-influence domains and create content that moves the needle.
  • AI Website Optimization — Are LLM crawlers even able to read your site?

Why PMMs Should Care

The inputs that drive AI recommendations — messaging clarity, competitive differentiation, category authority — are core PMM outputs. When an LLM decides whether to recommend your product, it's running a miniature analyst evaluation based on everything it's read about you.

Forrester says 89% of B2B buyers now use GenAI during their purchasing journey. Gartner predicts 25% decline in traditional search by 2026. The shift is happening whether you're ready or not.

The SAP Evaluation

Yan Yan Liang and I evaluated Evertune's platform on a recent call, looking at SAP's GEO visibility in the HCM category. The analysis covered word association, sentiment, competitive positioning, and which content topics SAP should prioritize to "educate" the models.

[SAP-specific results available to SAP employees — access here with internal code]
